params.prompt: Use attached reference photo as the human founder likeness reference. Create a premium 4:5 Limitless Club PROGRAM GRAPHIC. Visual concept: founder standing beside a silver-black AI gateway/monolith, with subtle blue agent network inside the gateway. The founder should be realistic, human, wearing light gray blazer and black shirt, approachable and confident. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Premium black graphite silver blue palette, elegant serif title, clean body type, mobile readable, safe margins, no clutter, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
